cases.prompt: Ask targeted questions to clarify the requirements before we implement anything.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a focused spec interview that uncovers missing details.

cases.prompt: Interview me about the feature so the spec is precise enough to build.
cases.expected_behavior: Surfaces assumptions and unclear areas with good questions.
This is an implementation request, not a clarification interview.

cases.prompt: The request is vague and could mean two different workflows; ask the minimum set of questions needed to pin it down.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses targeted clarification to remove ambiguity.
